title: Ethical Bytes marketing website (multi-page, themed, with contact form submission)

requirements.summary: Implement a multi-page Ethical Bytes site with client-side routes and shared header/footer navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: A header navigation is present on all pages with links to Home, About, Services, Pricing, Contact Us.
Each navigation link routes to the correct page without a full page reload.
Each page includes an H1 title matching the page name and content relevant to that page.
A footer is present on all pages with the company name “Ethical Bytes” and basic links.

file_operations.description: Create the app root that wires client-side routing for Home, About, Services, Pricing, and Contact Us, using a shared layout to keep header/footer present across routes.
Create a layout component that renders the shared header navigation, main content container, and footer across all pages.
Create the header with top-level navigation links to Home, About, Services, Pricing, and Contact Us (client-side links, no full reload).
Create the footer with “Ethical Bytes” branding and basic links mirroring the primary navigation.
Create the Home page with an H1 'Home' and marketing content relevant to Ethical Bytes.
Create the About page skeleton with an H1 'About' and space for mission/values + how-we-work content.
Create the Services page skeleton with an H1 'Services' and space for service sections/cards.
Create the Pricing page skeleton with an H1 'Pricing' and space for tier cards and CTAs.
Create the Contact Us page skeleton with an H1 'Contact Us' and a contact form area.
Ensure the created App component is imported correctly and rendered as the application root (keeping existing QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider intact).

requirements.summary: Populate the Services page with the three requested core services and optional additional digital-studio services.
acceptanceCriteria: Services page includes clear cards/sections for Website Development, Website Design, and Graphic Design.
Each service includes a short description and a small list of included deliverables.
Any additional services (if added) are clearly separated and do not replace/remove the three requested services.

file_operations.description: Implement service sections/cards for Website Development (website making), Website Design, and Graphic Design, each with a short description and deliverables list; optionally add clearly separated extra services (e.g., Branding, UI/UX, SEO basics). Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card, Badge) for consistent section styling—Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a small helper component to render the generated service icon asset(s) consistently within service cards, including appropriate alt text and sizing.

requirements.summary: Create a Pricing page with three tiers and CTAs that route to Contact Us.
acceptanceCriteria: Pricing page shows at least three tiers with a price (or “Starting at …”) and a feature list.
Each tier has a CTA button that routes to Contact Us.
Copy is in English and is consistent with the Ethical Bytes brand name.

file_operations.description: Implement at least three pricing tiers (e.g., Starter, Professional, Enterprise) with pricing/“Starting at …”, included features aligned to services, and a primary CTA button on each tier that routes to Contact Us. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card, Button) for tier layout and CTAs—Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Ensure the Contact Us route is wired so Pricing CTA navigation routes correctly without a full page reload.

requirements.summary: Create an About page with mission/values and a clear 'How we work' process section, responsive and in English.
acceptanceCriteria: About page includes a mission/values section and a simple process section (e.g., Discovery → Design → Build → Launch).
All user-facing text is in English.
Page layout is responsive for mobile and desktop.

file_operations.description: Add an Ethical Bytes mission/values section emphasizing ethical and transparent work, plus a 'How we work' process section (Discovery → Design → Build → Launch). Use responsive layout primitives and optionally shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card) for consistent presentation—Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement a Contact Us form with required fields and UI success/error/loading states, submitting inquiries via the existing backend interface.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form includes: name, email, service interest, message (company optional).
On submit, the UI shows a loading state, then a success confirmation when saved.
If submission fails, the UI shows an error message and does not lose the user’s typed content.
Submitted inquiries are persisted in the Motoko canister and remain available after refresh.

file_operations.description: Implement the Contact Us form (name, email, company optional, service interest dropdown, message) with loading, success confirmation, and error state that preserves typed content. Submit via the existing backend interface method submitInquiry(...) using useActor(). Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Input, Textarea, Select, Button, Alert) for accessible form controls—Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a React Query mutation hook that calls actor.submitInquiry(...) and exposes loading/error/success state for the Contact page; map user-facing service labels to backend ServiceInterest enum values defined in frontend/src/backend.d.ts.

requirements.summary: Apply a consistent Ethical Bytes visual theme across pages (no blue/purple-dominated primary palette) with accessible contrast.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share consistent typography, button styles, spacing, and section layout.
Primary color palette is not dominated by blue or purple.
Design remains accessible with sufficient contrast for text and interactive elements.

file_operations.description: Add global Tailwind base layers and define a cohesive warm/neutral brand palette via CSS variables (primary/foreground/background, etc.) that avoids blue/purple as the dominant primary color, ensuring accessible contrast for text and interactive elements.
Apply consistent spacing, max-width container behavior, and section rhythm so all pages share a unified layout and typography scale.
Style navigation and buttons consistently with the site theme (typography, spacing, hover/focus states) using composition with existing components (avoid editing immutable ui component files).

requirements.summary: Wire generated static brand imagery into the UI (logo, hero illustration, and service icons) using frontend/public assets.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist in frontend/public/assets/generated and are referenced directly by the frontend (not served via backend).
Home page includes at least one hero/brand image, and the site includes a logo mark or wordmark in the header.
Images render crisply on desktop and mobile (proper sizing and aspect ratio).

file_operations.description: Add the generated wordmark/logo image at frontend/public/assets/generated/ethical-bytes-logo.dim_512x256.png into the header branding area with appropriate alt text and responsive sizing.

Add a hero section that includes the generated illustration at frontend/public/assets/generated/ethical-bytes-hero.dim_1600x900.png, ensuring responsive rendering and appropriate aspect ratio handling.

Reference the generated service icon set at frontend/public/assets/generated/ethical-bytes-service-icons.dim_512x512.png within the Services page service cards/sections (or via a helper component) with consistent sizing and crisp rendering on mobile/desktop.

Optionally reuse the generated logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/ethical-bytes-logo.dim_512x256.png in the footer branding area to reinforce the brand visually, ensuring it remains lightweight and responsive.
